/share/apps/gcc/11.2.0/bin/gcc -gdwarf-3 -g "CMakeFiles/test-c.dir/test-c.c.o" -o ../bin/test-c  -Wl,-rpath,/people/hoan163/project/llamaProfiling/llama.cpp/LlamaBuildDebug/src:/people/hoan163/project/llamaProfiling/llama.cpp/LlamaBuildDebug/ggml/src ../src/libllama.so ../ggml/src/libggml.so /share/apps/cuda/12.3/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so
